subcodes.first_line: O thou sapling of the garden of God's love! Thy letter was read in utmost joy and fragrance, and from its contents it was understood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال باغ محبت الله نامه در نهایت روح و ریحان قرائت گردید و از مضمون مفهوم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
